outline.title: Christian Leadership

outline.title: What You'll Learn
outline.summary: Master biblical leadership principles and styles. Develop emotional intelligence and conflict resolution. Learn vision casting and team building. Cultivate servant leadership and character development.

outline.title: Course Structure
outline.summary: 10 comprehensive lessons covering biblical foundations, leadership styles, emotional intelligence, vision and strategy, team building, conflict resolution, servant leadership, character development, and integration.
